🚀 We’re Hiring: Senior Data Scientist – Real-World Data (RWD)

Are you passionate about turning real-world data into meaningful insights? This is your chance to work on impactful projects in a dynamic environment!

💼 Role: Senior Data Scientist (RWD)
📊 Experience: 6–9 Years
🌍 Location: Remote
📅 Contract: Minimum 6 Months (Extendable)

🔍 What We’re Looking For:
✔ Strong experience in Real-World Data (RWD)
✔ Expertise in Data Science, Machine Learning & Analytics
✔ Hands-on experience with large datasets & statistical modeling
✔ Ability to derive actionable insights from complex data

✨ Why Join?
Work on high-impact, real-world projects

Flexible remote opportunity

Opportunity for contract extension

📩 Interested candidates, share your CV at:
himanshu.tamang@bytebillion.com

extracted.full_content:
Strive4X Infotech Private Limited

5,614 followers

🚀 Hiring: AI-Driven Data Engineer | PySpark + Databricks + GenAI | 5+ Years | Contract-to-Hire
We’re hiring to work with a reputed MNC! If you have strong modern data engineering + AI capabilities, this is a high-impact opportunity.
📍 Hybrid Locations: Most of the top tier1 (Preferred) and tier-2 cities in India  (Bangalore, Hyderabad, Pune, Chennai, Mysore, Kolkata, Bhubaneswar, Nagpur, Chandigarh, Gurgaon, Indore, Thiruvananthapuram, Jaipur etc. ). 
💼 Experience: 5+ Years
📄 Contract: 6+ Months (C2H)
🔧 Must Have
✔️ ETL/ELT pipeline development (real-time, large scale)
✔️ PySpark + Databricks (Delta Lake, workflows)
✔️ Advanced SQL (performance tuning)
✔️ Large datasets (GB–TB scale)
🧠 Data Engineering Practices
✔️ Data Lineage, Governance, Data Contracts
✔️ Data Quality (validation, monitoring)
✔️ Tools like Unity Catalog / Fabric
🤖 GenAI (Practical Experience Required)
✔️ LLMs (GPT/Open-source), Prompt Engineering
✔️ API integrations, real-world use cases
✔️ AI-assisted development (Copilot/Claude)
🚫 Do Not Apply If
❌ <5 yrs experience
❌ No PySpark/Databricks hands-on
❌ Only theoretical GenAI
📩 Apply: career@strive4x.net
Subject: AI Data Engineer | Your Name
📋 Include:
Name | Mobile | Location | Experience | CTC | Notice | PF | C2H Comfort
⚡ Immediate joiners preferred (≤15 days)
#DataEngineer #Databricks #PySpark #GenAI #LLM #HiringNow #TechJobsIndia #ContractToHire #AIJobs #OpenToWork
